            std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
            hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);

            for (auto value : packet.data_values) {

            stream.write_container(data_values_be);

            // Convert checksum to big-endian and write
            uint32_t checksum_be = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
            stream.write(checksum_be);

            return buffer;
